mapper.select: /* 내 소속 팀 조회 TeamMemberDAO.listMyTeamStd */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY B.TEAM_LDRYN DESC, B.STD_ID) AS lineNo , B.TEAM_ID AS teamCd , A.TEAMNM AS teamNm , B.STD_ID AS stdNo , B.USER_ID AS userId , B.ROLE AS memberRole , B.TEAM_LDRYN AS leaderYn , (SELECT D.DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD D, TB_LMS_USR U WHERE U.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND D.DEPT_CD = U.DEPT_CD) AS deptNm , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = B.USER_ID) as userNm FROM TB_LMS_TEAM A JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR AS B ON A.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID WHERE A.TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd} AND B.TEAM_ID IN (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR WHERE STD_ID = #{stdNo})

/* 팀원 목록 조회 TeamMemberDAO.list */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY B.TEAM_LDRYN DESC, B.STD_ID) AS lineNo , B.TEAM_ID AS teamCd , A.TEAMNM AS teamNm , B.STD_ID AS stdNo , B.USER_ID AS userId , B.ROLE AS memberRole , B.TEAM_LDRYN AS leaderYn , (SELECT D.DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD D, TB_LMS_USR U WHERE U.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND D.DEPT_CD = U.DEPT_CD) AS deptNm , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = B.USER_ID) as userNm FROM TB_LMS_TEAM A JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR AS B ON A.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID WHERE B.TEAM_ID = #{teamCd}

/* 팀원 리스트 TeamMemberDAO.selectTeamMemberList */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY T.leaderYn DESC, T.userId ASC) as lineNo , T.* FROM ( SELECT A.TEAM_ID AS teamCd , B.DEPTNM AS deptNm , A.USER_ID AS userId , B.USERNM AS userNm , A.ROLE AS memberRole , IF(A.USER_ID = #{userId}, 'Z', A.TEAM_LDRYN) AS leaderYn FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.TEAM_ID = #{teamCd} ) AS T ORDER BY lineNo

/* 팀 구성된 팀원수 TeamMemberDAO.count */ SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM B ON A.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR C ON B.TEAM_TYCD = C.TEAM_TYCD WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND C.TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd}

/* 해당 토론의 소속팀 가져오기 TeamMemberDAO.getMeTeamCd */ SELECT B.TEAMNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR A JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM B ON A.TEAM_TYCD = B.TEAM_TYCD JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR C ON B.TEAM_ID = C.TEAM_ID AND C.STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) WHERE A.TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd}

/* 팀원 리스트 TeamMemberDAO.getTeamMemberList */ SELECT A.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM B ON A.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd} AND B.TEAMNM = #{teamNm}

/* 팀 분류코드 내 팀원 목록 조회 TeamMemberDAO.listTeamMemberByCtgrCd */ SELECT A.TEAM_ID , A.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR A JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM B ON A.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID WHERE B.TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd} ORDER BY B.TEAM_ID
